About: It is about a combination of various customs and systems that flourished in medieval Europe from the 9th to 15th centuries.
It is about a way of structuring society around relationships derived from the holding of land in exchange for service or labour.
It is about a set of reciprocal legal and military obligations of the warrior nobility.
It is about the key concepts of lords, vassals, and fiefs.
It is about the obligations of all three estates of the realm: the nobility, the clergy, and the peasantry.
It is about a system of manorialism.
It is about the applicability of the term feudalism in Central and Eastern European countries.
It is about the origin of the word feudal.

About: それは、9世紀から15世紀にかけて中世ヨーロッパで栄えた様々な慣習や制度の組み合わせについてです。
それは、土地の所有から派生する関係を中心に社会を構造化する方法についてです。
